title: NDA 2026 Preparation Guide: Complete Syllabus, Study Plan, Books & Expert Strategy
author: DefenceRoger Editorial
data: Preparing for the UPSC NDA Examination requires consistency, smart planning, and disciplined revision. This guide covers the latest NDA syllabus, exam pattern, recommended books, subject-wise strategy, study plan, previous year papers, and expert preparation tips to help aspirants crack the NDA written examination.
excerpt: Complete NDA 2026 Preparation Guide covering the latest syllabus, exam pattern, best books, study plan, preparation strategy, previous year papers, and expert tips.

content.text: The National Defence Academy (NDA) examination is conducted by the Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) for candidates aspiring to join the Indian Army, Indian Navy, and Indian Air Force after Class 12. It is one of India's most competitive defence entrance examinations and requires consistent preparation with the right strategy.

Every year, lakhs of aspirants compete for a limited number of vacancies. Success depends on conceptual clarity, regular revision, disciplined practice, and effective time management rather than studying from numerous books.
Consistency is more important than studying for long hours. Small daily improvements lead to success in NDA.

The NDA written examination consists of two papers. Mathematics carries 300 marks while the General Ability Test (GAT) carries 600 marks, making a total of 900 marks. Both papers have a duration of 2.5 hours each.
Candidates should first complete NCERT Class 11 and 12 Mathematics before moving to advanced NDA practice books.

content: Objective General English by S.P. Bakshi

content.text: Practicing at least the previous ten years of NDA question papers helps candidates understand question patterns, improve speed, identify weak areas, and gain confidence before the examination.

content.caption: A disciplined study routine is the key to NDA success.

content.text: Maintain consistency, revise regularly, solve mock tests under timed conditions, and focus on strengthening your fundamentals. With disciplined preparation and the right strategy, cracking the NDA written examination is absolutely achievable.
Your dream uniform begins with today's preparation.
